label: agent loop • cancelling at the very first tool call writes nothing at all
query: Create three files one per turn: one.txt with 1, two.txt with 2, three.txt with 3.
notes: The earliest-possible cancel: cancelAfterToolCalls 1 with a task whose very first action is a write means the run should stop right after that first processed call. The strongest zombie-write guard is that the LAST planned file (three.txt) never exists. Exit must be 'cancelled'. Off-CI (needs a model).
